## CI checks that must pass

- [ ] `npm test` passes with no new failures
- [ ] `npm run validate` passes (all agent frontmatter valid)
- [ ] No new ESLint errors in `src/` or `bin/`
- [ ] New backend files added to the correct directory (`src/core/harness/`, `src/core/`, `bin/`, `agents/sdlc/`, or `docs/github-issues/`)
